final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset_n,
    input d,
    output reg q
);always @(posedge clk or negedge reset_n) begin
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};

        if (~reset_n) begin
            q <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end

endmodule
